arts.ttl: Gallery: The best images as Palace face Manchester City
arts.sum: Crystal Palace head to Manchester City in the early Saturday game (12:30 BST) looking to extend our unbeaten run on the road - check out the best shots from the afternoon in our live gallery below.

arts.ttl: Man City v Palace team news: Savinho again a sub, no Foden

arts.ttl: Phil Foden is ABSENT from Man City's squad - less than a week after 'vile' chants about his mother from Man United fans
arts.sum: Phil Foden has been left out of the Manchester City squad, less than a week after Manchester United fans taunted him with vile chants about his mother.

arts.ttl: Why Phil Foden isn't in the Man City squad vs Crystal Palace as he adds to injury problems
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden will not feature against Crystal Palace after the knock he picked up in the derby

arts.ttl: Man City-Crystal Palace confirmed lineups: Foden ruled out, Guardiola makes three changes, McAtee decision revealed
arts.sum: Manchester City and Crystal Palace confirm their starting lineups for this afternoon's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Team News: Palace welcome back Richards for City test
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has made one change to his Crystal Palace starting XI for Saturday's Premier League trip to Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Crystal Palace - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Phil Foden is left out of squad to face Eagles a week after his mum was abused during Manchester derby
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester City welcome Crystal Palace to the Etihad in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Live Blog: Manchester City v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace travel to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday lunchtime (12:30 BST) to take on reigning Premier League Champions, Manchester City - follow our live coverage throughout the day.

arts.ttl: Manchester City and PSG retain Maghnes Akliouche interest
arts.sum: Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain both showed interest in signing AS Monaco’s Maghnes Akliouche (23) last summer. However, the France youth international opted to remain at his formative club, even…
